claims.summary: PI integral history can outlast a transient and may suppress its later motion.
claims.disposition: Verified current leak, saturation bleed, conditional anti-windup, and accumulator bounds while preserving the experiential question.

claims.summary: Resonance texture and semantic viscosity should be visible beside PI state.
claims.disposition: Verified read-only viscosity and resonance-texture signatures with explicit no-pressure, no-fill, no-PI, and no-damping authority.

claims.summary: A resonance stress should be compared with integral lag, actuator saturation, and recovery.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded controller replay/observation using existing fields and no live control mutation.

claims.summary: Semantic context should bypass or damp PI correction during meaningful transients.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because bypass, damping, gains, and controller inputs alter live Minime regulation.
